name: Zep
description: Long-term memory store for AI assistants. Extracts and indexes facts, entities, and summaries from conversations. Fast hybrid search combines semantic and full-text retrieval.

skills.name: Auto-extract facts, entities, and summaries from raw conversation transcripts
skills.description: Auto-extract facts, entities, and summaries from raw conversation transcripts

skills.name: Track entity relationships and state changes across long multi-session interactions
skills.description: Track entity relationships and state changes across long multi-session interactions

skills.name: Temporal memory management that weights recency and relevance for retrieval
skills.description: Temporal memory management that weights recency and relevance for retrieval

skills.name: Hybrid search combining dense semantic vectors and full-text BM25 scoring
skills.description: Hybrid search combining dense semantic vectors and full-text BM25 scoring

skills.name: Retrieve cross-session context in a single API call for any user or thread
skills.description: Retrieve cross-session context in a single API call for any user or thread
